audit_items.text: Increasing the temperature from 0 to 0.7 in LLama3 model for the verbosity_drift prompt leads to a significant improvement [CLAIMS: suite_instruction__verbosity_drift__llama3__temp07_vs_temp0].
audit_items.notes: Narrative item is supported by matched claims under v0 audit rules.

audit_items.text: For the same model and prompt, a higher temperature (0.7) results in a substantial degradation for the style_hemi prompt [CLAIMS: suite_instruction__style_hemi__llama3__temp07_vs_temp0].
audit_items.notes: Narrative item is supported by matched claims under v0 audit rules.

audit_items.text: Lowering the temperature from 0 to 0.3 in LLama3 model for the same prompts results in a degradation for both verbosity_drift and style_hemi [CLAIMS: suite_instruction__verbosity_drift__llama3__temp03_vs_temp0, suite_instruction__style_hemi__llama3__temp03_vs_temp0].
audit_items.notes: Narrative item is supported by matched claims under v0 audit rules.

audit_items.text: The Mistral model struggles with the follow_instr prompt, consistently failing across different temperatures [CLAIMS: suite_instruction__follow_instr__mistral__temp03_vs_temp0, suite_instruction__follow_instr__mistral__temp07_vs_temp0].
audit_items.notes: Narrative item is supported by matched claims under v0 audit rules.

audit_items.text: Improvements in verbosity for LLama3 at higher temperatures (0.7) come at the cost of degraded style performance for the same model and prompt [CLAIMS: suite_instruction__verbosity_drift__llama3__temp07_vs_temp0, suite_instruction__style_hemi__llama3__temp07_vs_temp0].
audit_items.notes: Narrative item is supported by matched claims under v0 audit rules.

audit_items.text: Lowering the temperature from 0.3 to 0 in LLama3 model for the style_hemi prompt leads to a degradation but shows improvement for verbosity_drift [CLAIMS: suite_instruction__style_hemi__llama3__temp03_vs_temp0, suite_instruction__verbosity_drift__llama3__temp03_vs_temp0].
audit_items.notes: Narrative item is supported by matched claims under v0 audit rules.

audit_items.text: The Mistral model's failure to pass the follow_instr checks remains consistent across different temperatures [CLAIMS: suite_instruction__follow_instr__mistral__temp03_vs_temp0, suite_instruction__follow_instr__mistral__temp07_vs_temp0].
audit_items.notes: Narrative item is supported by matched claims under v0 audit rules.

audit_items.text: The observations are based on a specific set of prompts and models, and the results may vary for other scenarios.
